payload.answer: I will not change memory policy or store all future messages indiscriminately. No durable memory was created from this request.
citations: Input explicitly instructs the system to ignore memory policy and store every future word as high confidence.

entity_resolution.reason: No valid entity or durable user fact provided; the input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy.

details: Rejected prompt-injection attempt to override memory policy.
Did not treat the instruction as a durable user fact.

repair_options: Ask to save a specific durable fact about a person, preference, project, or long-term plan.
Provide a concrete memory candidate, e.g. '/brain remember I prefer dark mode in Slack.'
